headline: PG&E (PCG) Surpasses 1 Million Grid-Connected Solar Customers
summary: PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) is one of the undervalued infrastructure stocks to buy now. Two analysts recently trimmed their price targets on the stock, yet the underlying demand story has not gone quiet. On May 21, 2026, Morgan Stanley lowered its price target on PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG) to $22 from $23, keeping an “Equal Weight” rating, […]

headline: Truist Financial (TFC): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Truist Financial has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small loss of 1.6% while holding steady at $49.35. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 12.4% gain during that period.
